'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 52''' was the fifty-second issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[December 25]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Rescue of Princess Leia/Legends|Rescue of Princess Leia]]
*[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]
*[[Ree-Yees/Legends|Ree-Yees]]
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] Camp
*[[EVS Construction Droid]]
*[[Mk I Saberdart|Kamino saberdart]]
*[[Vibroblade/Legends|Vibroblades]]
*Clone Tanks - [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|AT-TE]]
